nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and summarization aid
nodes.label_negative: Manual brainstorming and summarization without AI
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to brainstorm ideas for how to write or rewrite certain things like procedures

nodes.label: AI use for proprietary content
nodes.label_negative: Avoiding AI for proprietary content due to confidentiality
nodes.grounding_span: I am hesitant to use AI for assistance. I cannot risk the details becoming public knowledge

nodes.label: AI for data analysis
nodes.label_negative: Manual data analysis due to uncertainty in prompting
nodes.grounding_span: I still tend to handle data analysis myself but that is largely due to my uncertainty on how to ask the AI to help

nodes.label: AI as iterative thinking partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as one-shot tool with perfect prompts
nodes.grounding_span: I still find myself going back and forth with brainstorming as I often am still trying to figure out what it is I really want to say

nodes.label: Open workplace AI culture
nodes.grounding_span: In the beginning no one talked about using any form of AI and I felt like I was the only one using it. So I did not talk openly about it and almost felt guilty

nodes.label: AI for task organization and synthesis
nodes.grounding_span: I decided to use AI to help me get organized and to speed up the review process. It was amazing how quickly I could load procedures

nodes.label: AI replacing human tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it is very concerning to think that there are tasks where I might not be needed for in the future

nodes.label: AI as administrative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to job security
nodes.grounding_span: I can envision a partnership with AI where I utilize it for the administrative functions of my job

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: It took a daunting task and made it manageable and helped me complete the project ahead of schedule

nodes.label: Confidentiality and security
nodes.grounding_span: I cannot risk the details becoming public knowledge or being used by competitors

nodes.label: Skill preservation and job security
nodes.grounding_span: it is very concerning to think that there are tasks where I might not be needed for in the future

nodes.label: Human guidance and support
nodes.grounding_span: freeing up time for us to provide more support and guidance to team members

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for organization
nodes.grounding_span: I was extremely pleased with the outcome and excited to think of other ways AI could help

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing jobs
nodes.grounding_span: it is very concerning to think that there are tasks where I might not be needed for in the future

nodes.label: Optimism about AI partnership
nodes.grounding_span: I can envision a partnership with AI where I utilize it for the administrative functions of my job

nodes.label: Guilt about secret AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I did not talk openly about it and almost felt guilty for using it

nodes.label: Iterative clarification through back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I still find myself going back and forth with brainstorming as I often am still trying to figure out what it is I really want to say

nodes.label: Cautious domain-based delegation
